title: Edge-Compatible API Backend with Hono
description: Route for building a type-safe, edge-compatible REST/RPC API using Hono, Drizzle ORM, Upstash Redis, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Initialize Next.js project with App Router and TypeScript
Set up Drizzle ORM — edge-compatible, no connection pooling required
Add Upstash Redis for caching and rate limiting via HTTP (edge-compatible)
Configure Hono as the API layer with typed RPC client and Zod validation
Add error monitoring and performance tracing
Set up unit tests for route handlers and business logic
Configure CI/CD to run tests and type-check on every push
Deploy to Vercel edge runtime for globally distributed low-latency responses
